## Testing

- [ ] New code is covered by **new tests** (CI enforces a coverage floor).
- [ ] When behavior changed intentionally, existing tests were **updated deliberately** — not deleted or loosened to make CI pass.
- [ ] `npm run build` (typecheck + build) and the `node --test` suite pass locally.
